ns0:entry.ns0:title: MicrosoftDocs/windows-powershell-docs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MicrosoftDocs/windows-powershell-docs
Language: dockerfile
This repo is used to contribute to Windows, Windows Server, and MDOP PowerShell module documentation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: corretto/corretto-docker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/corretto/corretto-docker
Language: dockerfile
Dockerfiles for Amazon Corretto Official images.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github-samples/planventure
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github-samples/planventure
Language: dockerfile
Planventure is a sample app used in GitHub for Beginners

ns0:entry.ns0:title: goldbergyoni/nodebestpractices
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/goldbergyoni/nodebestpractices
Language: dockerfile
✅ The Node.js best practices list (July 2024)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jaywcjlove/reference
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/reference
Language: dockerfile
面向开发者的技术速查清单（Cheat Sheets）集合，整理常见技术、工具与开发流程，帮助快速查阅关键信息，提高开发效率。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kagisearch/kagi-docs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kagisearch/kagi-docs
Language: dockerfile
Documentation for products made by Kagi Inc

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/vscode-remote-release
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-remote-release
Language: dockerfile
Visual Studio Code Remote Development: Open any folder in WSL, in a Docker container, or on a remote machine using SSH and take advantage of VS Code's full feature set.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/codex-universal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/codex-universal
Language: dockerfile
Base docker image used in Codex environments

ns0:entry.ns0:title: piyushsachdeva/CKA-2024
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/piyushsachdeva/CKA-2024
Language: dockerfile
This repository contains the notes and code snippets of the CKA 2025 YouTube Playlist. The content is based on the latest 2025 curriculum and includes hands-on demos, assignments, and exam-based scenarios. I will be covering everything from the basics to the advanced level.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: solana-foundation/solana-verifiable-build
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/solana-foundation/solana-verifiable-build
Language: dockerfile
CLI tool for deterministically building and verifying executable against on-chain programs or buffer accounts

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vulhub/vulhub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vulhub/vulhub
Language: dockerfile
